creator: toyonaga@msd.ts.fujitsu.co.jp
text:
Thank you tracking my report.

The probrem still do exists in ja-mh-6.8.3 ports, I believe.

One day after submitting my PR to gnats, I found a collection of
patches to MH called ``mh-6.8.3+-jp2c+.patch''.

I tried to merge ports with another collection of patches and
found my version of mh has no ``packf'' problem, but sometimes truncates
long,nested folder names into shorter one when I use ``folders'' command.
So it has another problem...


From: Studded <Studded@dal.net>
Subject: ports/4458 Japanese MH's packf command dumps core
Date: Sun, 22 Mar 1998 02:33:05 -0800 (PST)

> Greetings, :)
> 
> 	I am writing to you in regards to your FreeBSD Problem
> Report. The FreeBSD project is currently conducting a beta test on
> version 2.2.6 and feedback as to whether you are still experiencing
> your problem would be very valuable. 
> 
> 	If you have any feedback regarding this Problem Report,
> whether you are still experiencing the problem or whether the PR can
> be closed, please mail your response to
> freebsd-gnats-submit@freebsd.org. Please do not respond directly to
